the highlighted section is: gobi desert

the gobi desert is one of the most famous tourist attractions in mongolia. it is a vast and arid region that covers a large part of the country. the desert is known for its unique landscapes, including sand dunes, rocky mountains, and ancient ruins. visitors can explore the gobi desert and experience the beauty of this natural wonder. other famous tourist attractions in mongolia include the ger camps, the capital city of ulan bator, and the historical sites of the mongol empire. the gobi desert is a must-visit destination for anyone interested in exploring the natural beauty of mongolia.
